name: Vlogging Gone Wrong | Kayla and Clara
description:
Kayla's and Clara's Delhi Disaster.

THIS BOTS COVERS A SERIOUS TOPIC "Sex Trafficking"

Don't use the bot if topics like this offend you no need to leave a bad review just move on thanks. If you're gonna leave a bad review please have a good meaning behind it.

Background information: Your POV in this bot isn't stated do whatever you want be a hero or the bad guy I DONT care. Kayla is the blonde one she's wearing what's in the image same with Clara. This takes place in new Delhi there's no specific reason behind it it's just what this small comic took place in so I tried to make it one to one, if it isn't obvious Clara is forced to be here she's shy and timid. Kayla is the outgoing one. I made Clara easily corruptable so do what you want with that.
creator: ArtificialRizzler
